# Documentation

## Prose and specs (human-written)

- **`derivation_verification.md`** – Verification of derive scripts against metadata and DHS/Coordinating Center conventions. Not generated by scripts.
- **`MICS_hnir72fl_missing_design_vars.md`** – If you see *Missing required variables: wmweight, stratum, PSU, windex5* when running `derive_hnir72fl.R`, read this.

## Generated catalogs (do not edit by hand)

- **`*_metadata.json`** – Variable catalogs for raw data. Produced by `generate_variable_metadata.R` (HNIR* including **`hnir72fl.sav`** → `hnir72fl_metadata.json`), `generate_coir61fl_metadata.R`, `generate_coir72fl_metadata.R`, and **`generate_bh_metadata.R`** → `bh_metadata.json`.
